description: RPM services may only be furnished to established patients who have received professional services from the billing practitioner or a same-specialty practitioner in the same group within the last 3 years. New patients must complete an E/M visit before initiating RPM.
conditions: Patient must be an established patient (received services from billing practitioner or same-specialty practitioner in same group within last 3 years).
New patients must complete an Evaluation and Management (E/M) visit before RPM can be initiated.
Patients who initiated RPM during the PHE are grandfathered as established patients.
source_citation: Rule R001 — Patient Eligibility — Established Patient Requirement

description: To bill CPT codes 99453 and 99454, the practitioner must collect physiologic data for a minimum of 16 days in a 30-day billing period. This requirement does not apply to treatment management codes 99457 and 99458.
conditions: Physiologic data must be collected for a minimum of 16 days in a 30-day billing period.
source_citation: Rule R002 — Minimum Data Collection Days

description: Only one practitioner may bill RPM codes per patient during a 30-day period, even if multiple medical devices are in use.
conditions: Only one practitioner may bill RPM codes per patient per 30-day period.
source_citation: Rule R003 — Billing Frequency — One Practitioner Per Period

description: RPM and RTM may not be billed together for the same patient in the same 30-day period. Practitioners must choose one monitoring type per billing period.
conditions: RPM and RTM cannot be billed together for the same patient in the same 30-day period.
source_citation: Rule R004 — RPM and RTM Concurrent Billing

description: RHCs and FQHCs are eligible to bill for RPM services under HCPCS code G0511, requiring a minimum of 20 minutes of qualifying non-face-to-face RPM services furnished during a calendar month.
conditions: At least 20 minutes of qualifying non-face-to-face RPM services must be furnished during a calendar month.
source_citation: Rule R005 — Rural Health Clinics (RHCs) and FQHCs — Billing Eligibility
